name: Statue of Anguish Pattern
effectText: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Rock/EARTH/Level 7/ATK 0/DEF 2500) (this card is also still a Trap). If Summoned this way, your opponent cannot target this card with card effects while another Trap Card that is a monster is in the Monster Zone. If a card(s) is Special Summoned from your Spell & Trap Zone to the Monster Zone, while you control this card Summoned this way (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
